notes: Core pong mechanics work well with proper paddle collision, speed increase, and serve system, but the game starts in STATE_TITLE while initGame() is called first then immediately overridden, and the serve direction logic (serving toward the scorer rather than the one who was scored on) is slightly inverted from convention.
A solid and complete Pong build with working scoring, serving, pause and game-over flow, but it is not perfect due to frame-rate-dependent timing/speeds and a few nonessential state/control quirks.
